title: UNOPTFLAT loop break selects wrong stable state, causing permanent simulation deadlock

features.name: bistable combinational loop with complementary signals
features.description: Code should include a pair of combinational assignments where one signal is the inverse of another, and the second signal depends on the first through additional logic, creating two valid stable states
features.snippet:
assign a = !b;
assign b = expr && a;

features.name: id_ready and apu_stall bistable loop
features.description: Code should include a pair of signals id_ready and apu_stall where id_ready = !apu_stall and apu_stall depends on apu_rvalid and id_ready, forming a bistable loop
features.snippet:
assign apu_stall = apu_active_q && !(apu_rvalid && id_ready);
assign id_ready = !apu_stall;

features.name: combinational loop output gating FSM state update
features.description: Code should include a combinational loop whose output signal gates a state machine transition condition, where the wrong stable state selection causes the FSM to never complete
features.snippet:
assign done = apu_rvalid && id_ready;
always_ff @(posedge clk) if (done) apu_active_q <= 0;

features.name: UNOPTFLAT combinational loop with previous-cycle register state
features.description: Code should include a combinational loop where the loop-breaking condition depends on a register output from the previous clock cycle, creating a bistable that can resolve to wrong state

features.name: counter-based FSM with done from combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a counter that counts down over multiple cycles and a done signal that depends on both the counter terminal count and a combinational loop signal
